function.name: task_tracker
function.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"description": "Query the worldtimeapi for the current time.", "id": "1", "status": "in_progress"}, {"status": "pending", "id": "2", "description": "Create a Python script that logs the retrieved time."}, {"description": "Run the Python script and capture its output.", "id": "3", "status": "pending"}, {"status": "pending", "id": "4", "description": "Create SUMMARY.md with the process details and a mermaid diagram."}], "title": "Time Logging Workflow"}

task_list.description: Query the worldtimeapi for the current time.
Create a Python script that logs the retrieved time.
Run the Python script and capture its output.
Create SUMMARY.md with the process details and a mermaid diagram.
